text: The Team page Role column MUST use select menus, not badges, for selecting a team member's role
The Team page MUST provide a toggle to enable/disable a team member's status
Each Team member with the 'Agent' role MUST have select boxes for escalation categories: Service, Support, Sales, Account, Technical Assistance, and General Inquiry
Upgrade and deployment scripts MUST implement data integrity safeguards to prevent team member data loss during deployments
Verbose logging MUST be enabled on every part of the system during pre-production work

A 'Clean re-install' or 'Reset' configuration MUST exist that includes example records and values sufficient for a merchant administrator to study as best-practice examples (e.g., every prompt or quick action has an easy-to-grasp example)
A 'superadmin' role MUST exist that cannot be deleted or barred from changing any configuration
The superadmin MUST only be visible to the superadmin — other users MUST NOT see the superadmin team member in the UI
Superadmin credentials MUST be sent to the account holder's email address for safekeeping
An additional 'standard' admin account MUST be created for hand-off to the customer email address, which MUST be a different email address from the superadmin
The role name 'Agent' MUST be changed to 'Escalation agent'
The 'Escalation agent' role MUST have no admin access — they are humans to whom escalations are directed
The SPA console MUST be able to initiate tenant provisioning — this is a mandatory requirement
SPA tenant provisioning inputs MUST include: Merchant Name, merchant URL, merchant superadmin email, and entitlement type (Trial, Starter, Professional, or Enterprise)
Both SPA console and Purchase Event tenant provisioning MUST be fully automated with no involvement from Remaker Digital during the entire process
Tenant provisioning MUST never fail silently and MUST recover from faults

The customer identity flow MUST follow this sequence: (1) AI greeting and Quick Actions presented when chat opens, (2) customer inputs message or selects Quick Action, (3) AI checks Shopify auth and whether email is known — if NOT, AI requests it, (4) customer chooses anonymous or provides email, (5) if email provided, OTP sent, customer enters code, authenticated
There MUST NOT be a pre-chat form blocking the AI greeting — the greeting and Quick Actions MUST appear immediately when the chat UI opens
Customer identity flow is a P0 requirement along with SPA console UI for new tenant provisioning
All testing MUST be modularized to allow cooling cycles and/or use multiple cores in bursts to prevent heat-related system instability
A functional test harness is mandatory — untestable implementation is unacceptable
The critical-path test script (CP.1-CP.21) MUST be executed first with 100% pass rate as the first stage of admin UI testing
If critical-path errors are encountered, testing MUST immediately cease and new work items MUST be planned to resolve defects before resuming from the beginning
End-to-end tests MUST start with complete initialization of the tenancy — all pre-existing data deleted, tenancy in same state as freshly provisioned
Every run of end-to-end tests MUST re-seed the tenant for a clean state in every respect
When a tenancy is created, the superadmin MUST automatically receive a welcome email containing the URL to their Merchant administration console and the API key
Seed data MUST NOT include team members — the only team member in a freshly provisioned tenancy MUST be the superadmin logging in for the first time
For a non-disruptive upgrade in production, API and widget keys MUST NOT be disturbed and all configuration MUST be retained

The release plan MUST follow: (1) complete testing with 100% pass, (2) freeze release and branch, (3) provision beta tenants, (4) gather feedback, (5) enhance next release on parallel production, (6) non-disruptive upgrade
The Master Test Plan MUST be updated whenever testing Repeatable Procedures are created or updated
All tests MUST result in either a PASS, a FAIL, or a correction of the test — no other outcomes accepted
If a test is corrected, the updated Repeatable Procedure MUST be re-executed to verify the correction is valid
Tag-and-branch-forward (Model A) MUST be used as the branching model — no long-lived development branches
Beta tenant provisioning MUST use SPA manual provisioning via the Provider Console, not the seed script
A provisioning smoke test MUST be added as a formal step before real beta provisioning
A completely isolated parallel production environment (staging) MUST exist for testing non-disruptive upgrade procedures and next-release validation
The SPA provisioning test MUST serve as the pre-test leading directly to the critical-path test
SPA console MUST provide a means to set manually-created tenancies to EXPIRE at a future date — without this, manually created tenancies exist indefinitely
When a manual test is performed by the owner, an automated test MUST be created (added to the testing Repeatable Procedure) to emulate the manual test in future runs
If the owner finds an issue during manual testing, a regression test MUST be added to prevent it from recurring — this MUST be general guidance loaded for each session
The beta is of no value if Persistent Customer Memory features are not working correctly — PCM MUST NOT be deferred
The vectorize_conversation background scanner MUST use Option A (background scanner) to wire vectorization
Dedicated model training add-on MUST be deferred to post-launch and used as a trigger for fresh marketing activity ('continuous innovation' proof point)
Rewardful affiliate integration MUST be set up for the affiliate program
Rewardful requires Stripe live mode — it does not support Stripe test mode
The AGNTCY open-source project and Agent Red MUST be strictly isolated — Agent Red MUST interact with AGNTCY exclusively via GitHub, not share local artifacts or Docker containers
Work items MUST be presented one at a time with information and choices, pausing for owner input before proceeding — this is the preferred iterative working style
Brand primary color MUST be #ff3621 (orange-red)
Typography MUST use Inter for body text and JetBrains Mono for code (Option A)
Logo concept 3 (The Beacon/AR monogram) MUST be used as the brand logo
Documentation quality framework MUST include Vale config, markdownlint config, CI workflow, and feature inventory
Mermaid diagrams MUST be consistently used wherever they could illustrate relationships between system elements, APIs, or input/output standards

Platform analysis MUST pay special attention to addressable market size, partner diversity (positive indicator), and partner program benefits — joining an ecosystem with established competitors that can be matched on technology/features/quality but beaten dramatically on price
The Knowledge Database MUST never delete any records — retention policy is 'never delete' with ~400GB budget (~57,000 years of history)
Periodic audit sessions MUST occur with a clean context for self-care and inventory/inspection of assets and plans
Every 5th session (S100, S105, ...) MUST be automatically flagged as an audit session using handoff-embedded cadence (Option A)
Remaining work items MUST be grouped by overlapping knowledge for efficient implementation

When evaluating options, MUST prioritize: (1) implementation quality (efficiency, robustness, reliability, usability), (2) desirability (competitive, differentiating, superior usability), (3) downstream confidence (documentation, maintenance, testing)
Avoid generalizations such as 'simpler' or 'harder' — state specifically what is gained or lost: which protocols, failure modes, components, test coverage implications
The pipeline budget MUST reflect a P50 of 7,000ms and a timeout at 8,000ms
Stream-then-validate (Option A) MUST be used for the pipeline response delivery pattern
The sidebar footer logo MUST use NEW-BLOCK-LOGO-HORIZONTAL.svg, and the text 'Remaker Digital' MUST NOT be duplicated since the logo contains it in SVG form
The header top-right logo MUST use primary-logo-no-wordmark.svg
API keys MUST NOT be regenerated on each deployment — a solution MUST allow API keys to be retained after image updates
The Admin Console MUST be a fully functional administrative tool, NOT a mock-up or prototype for a UX designer
The Admin Console MUST work correctly for real customers — it MUST NOT be less than fully functional in any way
Seed data representing a not-real customer MUST be created that populates the admin UI with realistic data

The sidebar footer MUST display 'Agent Red Customer Experience' above the version number, and below it: 'Brought to you by remakerdigital.com. Copyright (c) 2026 Remaker Digital, a DBA of VanDusen & Palmeter, LLC. All rights reserved.'
The logo corners MUST be 90 degrees, NOT rounded
The admin UI MUST use the designer-approved dark mode palette: chrome #0a0a0a, page #141414, surface #1f1f1f, border #272727
Knowledge base article creation process MUST support RAG requirements including document upload, vectorization, staleness/obsolescence management, performance KPIs, cleansing, and monitoring/tuning
RAG configuration MUST cover both merchant-provided documents/information and Persistent Customer Memory feature
Category images representing the 10 most popular Shopify merchant categories MUST be created showing Agent Red as a helpful assistant in physical-world scenarios
20 branding images generated by OpenAI MUST be placed in branding/images/ directory for the Agent Red storefront

Remaining 1.0 release work items MUST include: (1) UI validation, (2) Shopify approval verification, (3) launch process, (4) PCM test data, (5) competitor comparison table, (6) tooltip alignment, (7) automated merchant notifications
Automated notification MUST be sent to merchants for technical outages, threshold breaches (hard technical and license constraints), and when API keys are available
Protected logo files MUST NOT be modified: icon-master.svg, primary-logo-no-wordmark.svg, icon-master.png, primary-logo-no-wordmark.png
Beta customer provisioning MUST use the Starter tier with no expiry date during the beta period
The knowledge base MUST be built by ingesting/crawling the merchant's storefront URL and its sublinks to generate configuration including knowledge articles
Storefront ingestion/crawling MUST block progress through the setup wizard — it MUST NOT be a background task run in parallel
The merchant superadmin MUST be able to watch the ingestion happen if possible — it should be a visible, foreground process
The brand_name MUST be inferred from the storefront or set arbitrarily based on the merchant type category during setup wizard
CONDITIONAL PASS MUST NOT be accepted for the 1.0 GA release gate — any test that does not cleanly PASS must be fixed or documented as 1.1 deferral with justification
No pre-existing failures MUST be accepted for the 1.0 GA release gate — known failing tests must be fixed or removed with justification before execution begins
When beta feedback fixes are made, all changes MUST be applied in the next release version — beta prime runs a pinned release image
Non-disruptive upgrade MUST be proven on staging before applying to beta prime production
The 'Escalate to human' feature MUST ask which person or escalation role to escalate to — auto-escalation without selection is a defect
The 'Assign to agent' dropdown in the escalation modal MUST show available team members, not just 'Auto-assign (best available)'
The SSE identity stream MUST send a synthetic 'stage' event before 'token' events so the widget creates a message bubble for identity preprocessor responses
The wizard 'Activate now' MUST properly handle array values (e.g., escalation_keywords) by keeping them as arrays, not joining into comma-separated strings
Error messages in the activation dialog MUST handle both string errors and {field_name, message} object errors — no [object Object] display
The wizard storefront step MUST show a 'Storefront detected' indicator when shopDomain is already set
Build and deploy one more time before making the go/no-go decision on freezing for beta customers
PCM feature MUST be fully operational for the beta — vectorization scanner, consent handling, and memory retrieval all working
The widget consent collection UI MUST be implemented for customers to grant/deny data memory consent
Copyright notice '© 2026 Remaker Digital, a DBA of VanDusen & Palmeter, LLC. All rights reserved.' MUST be included in all new work
Technical work MUST have elevated priority over creative/content work — technical implementation, testing, and new capabilities prioritized above creative assets and marketing
No effort estimates — focus on quality (correctness, completeness, absence of defects)
Never remove code, tests, features, or procedure entries without explicit owner approval in the current session
The wizard MUST auto-present on first login for a freshly provisioned tenant with no prior configuration
The RRF (Reciprocal Rank Fusion) scores MUST be normalized to a 0-1 range so they can exceed the MIN_RELEVANCE_SCORE threshold
The KB seed script MUST be idempotent — running it multiple times MUST NOT create duplicate entries
The Add article dialog MUST allow upload of documents (not just text entry)
GitHub repository MUST be strictly associated with the project board and vice-versa
Quality framework MUST implement the Diataxis documentation framework with quality standards applied before writing guides
Sentence case MUST be used for all UI labels throughout the admin interface
Honest feedback MUST be provided — never exaggerate quality or impact of owner's input
Knowledge Database session_prompts table MUST follow append-only event sourcing pattern — no UPDATE or DELETE operations
The seed.py script MUST require a --force flag to prevent accidental data destruction
The WI #296 AI-generated greeting message MUST be moved from Post-launch to Group 3 for implementation
The Stripe product catalog MUST include subscription tiers (Starter, Professional, Enterprise) with monthly and annual pricing plus metered overage using Stripe Billing Meters
The Stripe product catalog MUST include conversation packs (1K, 5K, 20K) and add-on modules (Multi-Language, Advanced Analytics, Priority Support)
Shopify and Stripe partner program approval criteria and enhanced relationship benefits MUST be documented
The activation dialog field tags MUST accurately reflect actual configuration field states — no inaccurate labels for fields like google_analytics_enabled or fine_tuning_enabled
The AI MUST proactively ask for the customer's email address in its FIRST response per the P0 identity mandate
The widget_greeting_message field MUST NOT be set to empty string during deactivation — empty string overrides platform defaults, while None allows defaults to apply
The Admin Console MUST be accessible via standalone URL with password gate followed by API key authentication — two-layer auth
All API responses MUST use camelCase field names (displayName, overallStatus, fcrRate, totalCount, statusBreakdown)
The Diataxis documentation framework MUST be used with updated plan incorporating quality standards before writing content
Vector search and BM25 MUST be parallelized using asyncio.gather() for knowledge retrieval performance
